projects.name: Field Of Echoes
projects.description: A role-play, farming game developed as a final academic project and subsequently continued as a personal Information Technology Project. Responsibilities included character finite state machine and interaction, item, inventory, farming, trading, NPC dialog, crafting, placeable objects, item conversion, combat systems (HP, stamina, damage, enemies), and scene consistency with a saving system.

projects.name: Quizza
projects.description: A simple 2D UI-focused quiz game developed to gain familiarity with the Unity UI system and C#. Features include a question panel with four clickable answer buttons, questions and answers stored as scriptable objects, score tracking based on correct answers and time, a progress slider, and a game restart option.

projects.name: Maze Runner
projects.description: A 2D Mario-like tile-based game created to learn Unity's tile and tilemap system. Players escape a jungle environment with monsters and obstacles, earning points by killing monsters or collecting coins. The character has three lives, with progress saved per stage, and a full reset upon losing all lives.
